name: context-dna-vscode
description: Autonomous learning system for developers - VS Code integration

languageModelTools.name: three-surgeons_cross-examine
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Run a multi-LLM cross-examination on a topic using 3 independent AI surgeons (Atlas/Claude, Cardiologist/GPT-4.1, Neurologist/Qwen3). Each surgeon analyzes independently, then cross-examines the others' findings. Supports single (1 pass), iterative (up to 3), and continuous (up to 5 with open exploration) review modes. Use for architecture decisions, code review, risk assessment, or any decision needing diverse AI perspectives.

topic.description: The topic, question, or code to cross-examine

mode.description: Review depth: single (1 pass), iterative (up to 3 passes), continuous (up to 5 passes with open exploration)

languageModelTools.name: three-surgeons_consult
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Quick consultation with 2 independent AI surgeons (Cardiologist/GPT-4.1-mini and Neurologist/Qwen3-4B). Faster than cross-examination — each surgeon gives an independent opinion without cross-examining the other. Use for quick second opinions or when speed matters more than depth.

topic.description: The topic or question to consult on

languageModelTools.name: three-surgeons_consensus
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Check confidence-weighted consensus across 3 AI surgeons on a specific claim. Returns each surgeon's confidence level and assessment, plus a weighted aggregate score. Use to validate assumptions, check if a proposed approach has broad agreement, or identify areas of disagreement between models.

claim.description: The claim or assertion to check consensus on

languageModelTools.name: three-surgeons_probe
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Health check all 3 AI surgeons (Atlas, Cardiologist, Neurologist). Returns status, latency, and availability for each. Use to verify the 3-surgeon system is operational before running cross-examinations.

context-dna.fleetUrl.description: Multi-Fleet daemon URL for fleet status
